name: sandy beach on a tropical isle
description: I'm in a sandy beach on a tropical isle
items_start:
Sign in the sand says:
`Welcome to Pirates Island, watch out for the tide!`
hints: You have arrived on Pirates Island! The sign warns about the tide. Explore the island.
The keel/mast and lagoon are important. Go EAST to explore the meadow. Watch the tide - it changes!
GO LAGOON when the tide is out to find treasures. GO EAST to reach the meadow with the mongoose and grass shack.
Explore EAST for the meadow. GO LAGOON for the anchor. The pirate ship arrives at the lagoon. BUILD BOAT here later with lumber and sails.
notes: Main beach on Pirates Island. The lagoon connects to the ocean/shore. EAST goes to the meadow (room 8). The tide cycle is important - when tide is out, the lagoon is accessible. Ship building materials can be used here.
